eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Nance, NE; at 09:04 AM ON APR 14, 2026 Effective until 11:04 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: WATER EMERGENCY UPDATE - The water main is shut off and being worked on. Please refrain from using any water for the next 2 hours. Bottled water will be available later today, more information to come.
